name: DC Hub Nexus
description: Real-time data center intelligence platform tracking 10,400+ facilities, M&A deals, capacity pipeline, and infrastructure worldwide

tools.name: search_data_centers
tools.description: Search for data center facilities by location, operator, or capacity. Returns facility details including coordinates, power capacity, and operator info.

query.description: Search query (city, state, country, or operator name)

tools.name: get_market_stats
tools.description: Get aggregated statistics about the global data center market including total facilities, power capacity, top operators, and geographic distribution.

tools.name: get_latest_news
tools.description: Get the latest data center industry news and announcements from 60+ sources.

tools.name: get_deals
tools.description: Get recent M&A deals and transactions in the data center industry.

tools.name: get_capacity_pipeline
tools.description: Get announced data center capacity expansions and new builds with MW estimates.

tools.name: analyze_site
tools.description: Analyze infrastructure around a geographic location for data center suitability including power, fiber, water, and land availability.
